response.justification: Strong senior fullstack profile with 15+ years of experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Solid TypeScript/Node.js/React track record at Optilyz and RIDE, recent AI-agent and MCP work at re:cinq aligns directly with the AI agent development requirement, and broad polyglot background (Java, DLang, Python-adjacent) fits the multi-language expectation. Gaps around Nest.js and Vitest specifically are minor given the breadth of comparable framework and testing experience (TDD, Jest-style testing, Selenium course authoring).
strengths: 15+ years fullstack across TypeScript/Node.js, React, and multiple backend languages
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generator work at re:cinq
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops on testing
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the resume
Vitest not named specifically (testing experience is broader/older frameworks)
PostgreSQL not mentioned; database experience skews to MongoDB and MySQL
